package fixture

import "context"

// WireDivergent models the case where the if/else branches write DIFFERENT
// wire shapes (different lengths or different op widths). The analyzer must
// keep both branches with their respective guards — NOT collapse.
type WireDivergent struct{}

func (m WireDivergent) Encode(l interface{}, ctx context.Context) func(map[string]interface{}) []byte {
	w := newWriter()
	return func(opts map[string]interface{}) []byte {
		if m.extended() {
			w.WriteInt(1)
			w.WriteByte(2)
		} else {
			w.WriteInt(0)
		}
		return w.Bytes()
	}
}

func (m WireDivergent) extended() bool { return true }
